analysisResult.goal: Enable basketball players to discover courts, share real-time conditions, and organize pickup games with a reputation system.

features.name: Map-based Court Discovery
features.description: Users find nearby courts on an interactive map using GPS location.

features.name: Apply Court Filters
features.description: Users filter courts by surface type, lighting availability, and crowd level.

features.name: View Court Details
features.description: Users tap a court pin to view full details including conditions and ratings.

features.name: Save Favorite Court
features.description: Users bookmark frequently visited courts to a personal favorites list.

features.name: Create Pickup Game
features.description: Hosts create a new game at a chosen court with a set time and player limit.

features.name: Join Open Game
features.description: Players browse open games and join ones with available slots.

features.name: List Open Games
features.description: System displays all open games with slot counts and court info.

features.name: Cancel Game
features.description: Hosts can cancel scheduled games and notify all registered participants.

data.title: Start
data.description: Workflow entry point

prdReference.rationale: Entry point

data.title: Load Court Discovery
data.description: Initialize court discovery with user location and court data

config.functionCode: return { courts: [{"id": "court-001", "name": "Riverside Park Court", "lat": 37.5665, "lng": 126.978, "surface": "asphalt", "lighting": true, "crowdLevel": "low", "rating": 4.2}, {"id": "court-002", "name": "Olympic Park Indoor", "lat": 37.5185, "lng": 127.1219, "surface": "hardwood", "lighting": true, "crowdLevel": "medium", "rating": 4.7}, {"id": "court-003", "name": "Hangang Court B", "lat": 37.528, "lng": 126.9363, "surface": "asphalt", "lighting": false, "crowdLevel": "high", "rating": 3.8}], userLocation: { lat: 37.5665, lng: 126.9780 } };

prdReference.rationale: Loads initial court data and user location for the discovery map

testCases.description: Valid execution of Load Court Discovery

testCases.name: Failure case
testCases.description: Error handling in Load Court Discovery

testCases.description: Boundary conditions in Load Court Discovery

data.title: Discover Nearby Courts
data.description: Find and display basketball courts near the user

data.title: Fetch Nearby Courts
data.description: GET /courts/nearby with user location

prdReference.rationale: Calls backend API to retrieve courts near user GPS position

testCases.name: Success case
testCases.description: Valid execution of Fetch Nearby Courts

testCases.name: Failure case
testCases.description: Error handling in Fetch Nearby Courts

testCases.name: Edge case
testCases.description: Boundary conditions in Fetch Nearby Courts

data.title: Sort by Distance
data.description: Sort fetched courts by proximity to user

config.functionCode: const sorted = [...inputData.courts].sort((a,b) => Math.abs(a.lat-37.5665)+Math.abs(a.lng-126.9780) - (Math.abs(b.lat-37.5665)+Math.abs(b.lng-126.9780))); return { courts: sorted, filteredCount: sorted.length };

prdReference.rationale: Orders courts from nearest to furthest for better UX

testCases.name: Success case
testCases.description: Valid execution of Sort by Distance

testCases.name: Failure case
testCases.description: Error handling in Sort by Distance

testCases.name: Edge case
testCases.description: Boundary conditions in Sort by Distance

data.title: Render Map Pins
data.description: Transform court list into map pin data

config.functionCode: return { mapPins: inputData.courts.map(c => ({ courtId: c.id, lat: c.lat, lng: c.lng, label: c.name })) };

prdReference.rationale: Converts court data to map-renderable pin objects

testCases.description: Valid execution of Render Map Pins

testCases.name: Failure case
testCases.description: Error handling in Render Map Pins

testCases.name: Edge case
testCases.description: Boundary conditions in Render Map Pins

config.functionCode: return inputData;

prdReference.rationale: Orchestrates fetching, sorting, and rendering of nearby courts

data.title: Apply Court Filters
data.description: Filter courts by surface type, lighting, and crowd level

data.title: Validate Filter Input
data.description: Ensure filter values are within accepted ranges

config.functionCode: const validSurfaces = ['asphalt','hardwood','concrete']; const validCrowd = ['low','medium','high']; return { filters: { surface: validSurfaces[0], lighting: true, crowdLevel: validCrowd[0] }, courts: inputData.courts };

prdReference.rationale: Validates user-selected filter criteria before applying

testCases.name: Success case
testCases.description: Valid execution of Validate Filter Input

testCases.name: Failure case
testCases.description: Error handling in Validate Filter Input

testCases.name: Edge case
testCases.description: Boundary conditions in Validate Filter Input

data.title: Apply Court Filters
data.description: Filter court list by validated criteria

config.functionCode: const f = inputData.filters; return { courts: inputData.courts.filter(c => (!f.surface || c.surface===f.surface) && (!f.lighting || c.lighting===f.lighting)), appliedFilters: f };

prdReference.rationale: Applies selected filters to narrow down court results

testCases.name: Success case
testCases.description: Valid execution of Apply Court Filters

testCases.name: Failure case
testCases.description: Error handling in Apply Court Filters

testCases.name: Edge case
testCases.description: Boundary conditions in Apply Court Filters

data.title: Update Map Display
data.description: Re-render map with filtered courts only

config.functionCode: return { mapPins: inputData.courts.map(c => ({ courtId: c.id, lat: c.lat, lng: c.lng, label: c.name })), resultCount: inputData.courts.length };

prdReference.rationale: Updates map to show only courts matching applied filters

testCases.name: Success case
testCases.description: Valid execution of Update Map Display

testCases.name: Failure case
testCases.description: Error handling in Update Map Display

testCases.name: Edge case
testCases.description: Boundary conditions in Update Map Display

config.functionCode: return inputData;

prdReference.rationale: Handles the filtering UX for court discovery

data.description: Show full details and current conditions for a selected court

data.description: GET /courts/:id returns full court info with conditions

data.title: Parse Court Info
data.description: Summarize conditions from raw API response

config.functionCode: const latest = inputData.recentConditions[0]; return { court: inputData.court, conditionSummary: { crowdLevel: latest?.crowdLevel ?? 'unknown', lastUpdated: latest?.reportedAt ?? '', reportCount: inputData.recentConditions.length } };

prdReference.rationale: Transforms raw condition data into a readable summary

testCases.name: Success case
testCases.description: Valid execution of Parse Court Info

testCases.name: Failure case
testCases.description: Error handling in Parse Court Info

data.title: Build Court Card
data.description: Compose final display object for court detail UI

config.functionCode: return { courtCard: { name: inputData.court.name, rating: inputData.court.rating, surface: inputData.court.surface, crowdLevel: inputData.conditionSummary.crowdLevel, canJoinGame: inputData.court.crowdLevel !== 'high' } };

prdReference.rationale: Builds a UI-ready court card with all relevant info

data.title: Join Game
data.description: Users browse and join open pickup games

data.title: Check Join Eligibility
data.description: Verify game is open and user hasn't already joined

config.functionCode: const game = inputData.games.find(g => g.status === 'open') || inputData.games[0]; return { game, canJoin: game.currentPlayers < game.maxPlayers, availableSlots: game.maxPlayers - game.currentPlayers };

prdReference.rationale: Verifies the game has available slots before allowing join

config.functionCode: return { games: [{id:'game-001',courtId:'court-001',hostId:'user-101',time:'2026-03-25T14:00:00Z',maxPlayers:10,currentPlayers:inputData.currentPlayers,status:'open'},{id:'game-002',courtId:'court-002',hostId:'user-102',time:'2026-03-25T16:00:00Z',maxPlayers:8,currentPlayers:8,status:'full'},{id:'game-003',courtId:'court-003',hostId:'user-103',time:'2026-03-26T10:00:00Z',maxPlayers:6,currentPlayers:2,status:'open'}], joinedGame: { id: inputData.gameId, currentPlayers: inputData.currentPlayers, status: 'open' }, message: 'Successfully joined the game!' };

prdReference.rationale: Updates UI with new player count after successful join

testCases.description: Valid execution of Show Join Confirmation

testCases.description: Boundary conditions in Show Join Confirmation

data.title: Filter Open Games
data.description: Show only games with available slots

config.functionCode: const open = inputData.games.filter(g => g.status === 'open'); return { games: open, openCount: open.length };

prdReference.rationale: Filters out full or cancelled games from the list

data.title: Build Game Cards
data.description: Transform game data into renderable card objects

config.functionCode: return { gameCards: inputData.games.map(g => ({ id: g.id, time: g.time, slots: g.maxPlayers - g.currentPlayers, courtId: g.courtId })) };

prdReference.rationale: Builds display-ready game card data for the UI

data.title: Cancel Game
data.description: Allow the host to cancel a scheduled game

data.title: Verify Cancel Rights
data.description: Confirm user is the host before allowing cancellation

config.functionCode: const game = inputData.games[0]; return { game, isHost: game.hostId === 'user-101', canCancel: game.status !== 'cancelled' };

prdReference.rationale: Checks if the current user is the game host
